# Heart Studio by Chan

Heart Studio is a small, intentional yoga studio in Da Nang, Vietnam, founded and taught by Chan.

## About

- Location: 36 Nai Nam 8, Hai Chau, Da Nang, Vietnam
- Contact: @heartstudio.dn on Instagram
- Languages: English and Vietnamese
- Website: https://heartstudiodn.com

## Instructor

Chan has 8 years of yoga teaching experience and over 1,000 hours of training in yoga, anatomy, and therapeutic movement. She has led anatomy trainings and teacher mentorship programs for teachers across Vietnam. She studied in Hoi An, Thailand, and Bali.

## Classes

- Hatha Yoga — alignment, breath, and posture awareness; all levels welcome
- Vinyasa Yoga — flowing, breath-linked movement; all levels welcome
- Yin Yoga — long-held postures, nervous system regulation; all levels welcome
- Breath, Core & Posture — functional movement for spinal health and core strength

## Booking & Policies

Book via Vibefam at heartstudiodn.com. Walk-ins are welcome; advance booking is recommended. Free cancellation up to 3 hours before class. Private sessions and workshops available — message on Instagram to arrange.

## Languages

Chan teaches comfortably in both English and Vietnamese. All studio communications are bilingual.
